title: 5 traits God builds in a man before a wife shows up
caption:
You're not behind.

Five traits God builds in a man before a wife shows up. None of them require a girlfriend to develop. All of them matter more than finding her.

Govern yourself. Pray without an audience. Go first into the cost. Stay in the room when conflict shows up. Get men who know your sin.

That's the formation. You can't shortcut it and you can't skip it. You just build.

"The man who finds a wife finds a good thing." — Proverbs 18:22. He *finds* her. That requires becoming someone worth finding.

The order matters. Chase the right thing first.

—

Comment "ready" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#ethos #christianmen #faithoverfear #godlymen #manofgod #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #relationships #christianity #scripture
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
